summary: Rev 2 focused re-review (non-authoring). Both r1 blockers FOLDED faithfully; no new defect. B1 RESOLVED: VIII.2 entrenches the CANONICAL 6-stage loop plan→critic→scope→execute→verify→evidence (byte-matching III.1 :88-90) and demotes the 5-stage form to 'shorthand ONLY, never licenses dropping the non-authoring critic stage' — consistent with the VII.2-protected critic/verifier requirement. B2 RESOLVED with TEETH: VIII.3(a) forbids UNAUTHORIZED/UNDISCLOSED masking only, defers explicitly to V.2/V.3/V.6/III.4/V.5, and names the authorization standard verbatim from V.2 (landmark-authorized scope.lock + human gate + critic/verifier chain) — a hostile maintainer cannot self-certify 'authorized'; no contradiction with III.4 (whose carve-out is freeze-trigger-only, still forbidding masking). A1/A2/A4/A6/A7 folds present and correctly worded; A3/A5 are NAMED gate-decisions with recommendations (AUTONOMY binding YES — schema-backing verified to exist; VI.1 INCLUDE). No-new-defect checks: target constitution unchanged 211 lines/7 articles; codex baseline 3 lines consistent with the 3→4 claim; lexeme intersection EMPTY. APPROVE, 0 blockers, 2 info advisories.
